actionUnits.condition: Target MonoBehaviour ShowMessage (script guid 6e888d82ad62a4fd99699eeee0553755, MonoBehaviour id 939) has only one public method RunMessage(string), which requires a parameter. MessageText has no Collider/Rigidbody/EventTrigger and no UnityEvent m_Calls configured in scene, so it cannot be triggered automatically via scene events or by a parameterless public method. To cover the coroutine ShowText, we need a UI event (e.g., Button.onClick) or another script to invoke RunMessage at runtime with a test string (and ensure a CanvasGroup exists on the parent to observe fade in/out: alpha -> 1, wait 5s, alpha -> 0). Please provide the invoker object (fileID) or an exposed parameterless wrapper method.
